tables.name: awards_coaches
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "awards_coaches"
(
    id      INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    year    INTEGER,
    coachID TEXT,
    award   TEXT,
    lgID    TEXT,
    note    TEXT,
    foreign key (coachID, year) references coaches (coachID, year)
        on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: id of this row of data
which year did the coach receive the honor?

bird_description.value_description: mainly categories: "NBA" & "ABA"
mainly categories: "NBA" & "ABA"

”null“ refers to that no special things
”tie“ represents that coaches are tied for some awards

tables.name: awards_players
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE awards_players
(
    playerID TEXT not null,
    award    TEXT not null,
    year     INTEGER          not null,
    lgID     TEXT null,
    note     TEXT null,
    pos      TEXT null,
    primary key (playerID, year, award),
    foreign key (playerID) references players (playerID)
            on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: ID number identifying the unique number of the player

bird_description.value_description: mainly categories: "NBA" & "ABA"

”null“ refers to that no special things
”tie“ represents that coaches are tied for some awards

C: Center
F: Forward
G: Guard

tables.name: coaches
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE coaches
(
    coachID     TEXT not null,
    year        INTEGER          not null,
    tmID        TEXT not null,
    lgID        TEXT null,
    stint       INTEGER          not null,
    won         INTEGER          null,
    lost        INTEGER          null,
    post_wins   INTEGER          null,
    post_losses INTEGER          null,
    primary key (coachID, year, tmID, stint),
    foreign key (tmID, year) references teams (tmID, year)
            on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: ID number identifying the unique number of the coach

bird_description.value_description: abbreviated name
mainly categories: "NBA" & "ABA"

bird_description.description: the period of the time coaching this team

bird_description.value_description: 0: no wins
0: win all the games

bird_description.description: the number of games won in the post-season (playoffs) games
bird_description.value_description:
0: no wins

commonsense evidence:

If the team's post-season wins and losses are all zero, it implies that the team did not participate in the post-season (playoffs) that year.

bird_description.description: the number of games lost in the post-season (playoffs) games
bird_description.value_description:
0: win all the games

commonsense evidence:

If the team's post-season wins and losses are all zero, it implies that the team did not participate in the post-season (playoffs) that year.

tables.name: draft
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE draft
(
    id             INTEGER default 0 not null
        primary key,
    draftYear      INTEGER           null,
    draftRound     INTEGER           null,
    draftSelection INTEGER           null,
    draftOverall   INTEGER          null,
    tmID           TEXT  null,
    firstName      TEXT  null,
    lastName       TEXT  null,
    suffixName     TEXT  null,
    playerID       TEXT  null,
    draftFrom      TEXT  null,
    lgID           TEXT  null,
    foreign key (tmID, draftYear) references teams (tmID, year)
            on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: the unique number to determine one row of the data
which year does this draft happens
the Round number of this draft
bird_description.value_description:
If the value is 0, it means that there is no draft in this year

1 refers that this player was picked in the first round

bird_description.description: the position that the player was picked
bird_description.value_description:
0：This signifies that it doesn't contain the draft information of this player

7：this player was selected in the 7th position in this round

commonsense evidence:

draftRound: 1; 
draftSelection: 7 
represents: this player was selected in the round 1, 7th position.

bird_description.description: The player's overall draft position for the year
bird_description.value_description: this is the overall draft rank of the player.
abbreviated name

bird_description.description: the first name of the player
the last name of the player
the suffix name of the player
ID number identifying the unique number of the player
the university that the drafted players come from
bird_description.value_description: the name of the university
mainly categories: "NBA" & "ABA"

tables.name: player_allstar
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE player_allstar
(
    playerID        TEXT not null,
    last_name       TEXT null,
    first_name      TEXT null,
    season_id       INTEGER          not null,
    conference      TEXT null,
    league_id       TEXT null,
    games_played    INTEGER          null,
    minutes         INTEGER          null,
    points          INTEGER          null,
    o_rebounds      INTEGER          null,
    d_rebounds      INTEGER          null,
    rebounds        INTEGER          null,
    assists         INTEGER          null,
    steals          INTEGER          null,
    blocks          INTEGER          null,
    turnovers       INTEGER          null,
    personal_fouls  INTEGER          null,
    fg_attempted    INTEGER          null,
    fg_made         INTEGER          null,
    ft_attempted    INTEGER          null,
    ft_made         INTEGER          null,
    three_attempted INTEGER          null,
    three_made      INTEGER          null,
    primary key (playerID, season_id),
    foreign key (playerID) references players (playerID)
            on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: ID number identifying the unique number of the player
the last name of the player
the first name of the player
the id number of the season
which conference that players belong to
bird_description.value_description: two categories: west; east
two categories: NBA; ABA

bird_description.description: how many all star games that this player played in this season
bird_description.value_description: mostly it's 1
18：played in 18 minutes

19: get 19 points；

null --> doesn't get points

tables.name: players
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE players
(
    playerID      TEXT not null
        primary key,
    useFirst      TEXT null,
    firstName     TEXT null,
    middleName    TEXT null,
    lastName      TEXT null,
    nameGiven     TEXT null,
    fullGivenName TEXT null,
    nameSuffix    TEXT null,
    nameNick      TEXT null,
    pos           TEXT null,
    firstseason   INTEGER          null,
    lastseason    INTEGER         null,
    height        REAL        null,
    weight        INTEGER         null,
    college       TEXT null,
    collegeOther  TEXT null,
    birthDate     DATE         null,
    birthCity     TEXT null,
    birthState    TEXT null,
    birthCountry  TEXT null,
    highSchool    TEXT null,
    hsCity        TEXT null,
    hsState       TEXT null,
    hsCountry     TEXT null,
    deathDate     DATE         null,
    race          TEXT null
)

bird_description.description: ID number identifying the unique number of the player

bird_description.value_description: not useful

bird_description.description: the first name of the player
the middle name of the player
the last name of the player

tables.name: players_teams
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "players_teams"
(
    id                 INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    playerID           TEXT not null
        references players
            on update cascade on delete cascade,
    year               INTEGER,
    stint              INTEGER,
    tmID               TEXT,
    lgID               TEXT,
    GP                 INTEGER,
    GS                 INTEGER,
    minutes            INTEGER,
    points             INTEGER,
    oRebounds          INTEGER,
    dRebounds          INTEGER,
    rebounds           INTEGER,
    assists            INTEGER,
    steals             INTEGER,
    blocks             INTEGER,
    turnovers          INTEGER,
    PF                 INTEGER,
    fgAttempted        INTEGER,
    fgMade             INTEGER,
    ftAttempted        INTEGER,
    ftMade             INTEGER,
    threeAttempted     INTEGER,
    threeMade          INTEGER,
    PostGP             INTEGER,
    PostGS             INTEGER,
    PostMinutes        INTEGER,
    PostPoints         INTEGER,
    PostoRebounds      INTEGER,
    PostdRebounds      INTEGER,
    PostRebounds       INTEGER,
    PostAssists        INTEGER,
    PostSteals         INTEGER,
    PostBlocks         INTEGER,
    PostTurnovers      INTEGER,
    PostPF             INTEGER,
    PostfgAttempted    INTEGER,
    PostfgMade         INTEGER,
    PostftAttempted    INTEGER,
    PostftMade         INTEGER,
    PostthreeAttempted INTEGER,
    PostthreeMade      INTEGER,
    note               TEXT,
    foreign key (tmID, year) references teams (tmID, year)
        on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.description: the unique number to identify this record

the period of the time player spent played for this team

min: 0, max: 82

if this number is equal to 82, means full attendance

tables.name: series_post
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE "series_post"
(
    id         INTEGER
        primary key autoincrement,
    year       INTEGER,
    round      TEXT,
    series     TEXT,
    tmIDWinner TEXT,
    lgIDWinner TEXT,
    tmIDLoser  TEXT,
    lgIDLoser  TEXT,
    W          INTEGER,
    L          INTEGER,
    foreign key (tmIDWinner, year) references teams (tmID, year)
        on update cascade on delete cascade,
    foreign key (tmIDLoser, year) references teams (tmID, year)
        on update cascade on delete cascade
)

bird_description.value_description:
known abbreviations：

F：final 
SF: semi-final 

QF：quater-final 1/4

DF：division-final 

DSF：division semi-final
not useful

tables.name: teams
tables.create_sql:
CREATE TABLE teams
(
    year        INTEGER          not null,
    lgID        TEXT null,
    tmID        TEXT not null,
    franchID    TEXT null,
    confID      TEXT null,
    divID       TEXT null,
    `rank`      INTEGER          null,
    confRank    INTEGER          null,
    playoff     TEXT null,
    name        TEXT null,
    o_fgm       INTEGER          null,
--     o_fga       int          null,
    o_ftm       INTEGER          null,
--     o_fta       int          null,
--     o_3pm       int          null,
--     o_3pa       int          null,
--     o_oreb      int          null,
--     o_dreb      int          null,
--     o_reb       int          null,
--     o_asts      int          null,
--     o_pf        int          null,
--     o_stl       int          null,
--     o_to        int          null,
--     o_blk       int          null,
     o_pts       INTEGER          null,
--     d_fgm       int          null,
--     d_fga       int          null,
--     d_ftm       int          null,
--     d_fta       int          null,
--     d_3pm       int          null,
--     d_3pa       int          null,
--     d_oreb      int          null,
--     d_dreb      int          null,
--     d_reb       int          null,
--     d_asts      int          null,
--     d_pf        int          null,
--     d_stl       int          null,
--     d_to        int          null,
--     d_blk       int          null,
     d_pts       INTEGER          null,
--     o_tmRebound int          null,
--     d_tmRebound int          null,
    homeWon     INTEGER          null,
    homeLost    INTEGER          null,
    awayWon     INTEGER          null,
    awayLost    INTEGER          null,
--     neutWon     int          null,
--     neutLoss    int          null,
--     confWon     int          null,
--     confLoss    int          null,
--     divWon      int          null,
--     divLoss     int          null,
--     pace        int          null,
    won         INTEGER          null,
    lost        INTEGER          null,
    games       INTEGER          null,
--     min         int          null,
    arena       TEXT null,
--     attendance  int          null,
--     bbtmID      varchar(255) null,
    primary key (year, tmID)
)

bird_description.value_description:
main categories:
NBA, ABA
abbreviated name
not useful
not useful
less is better
not useful
for brevity, if the value is not null or empty, it means this team attends the playoffs, otherwise, means not attend

bird_description.description: how many offense field goal made by this team in this season
how many offense free throw made by this team in this season

bird_description.value_description: total wins of this team in this year.
total losts of this team in this year.
total number of games that this team played in this year (season)
null or empty refers to the fact that this team doesn't have individual arenas, otherwise, it has individual arenas
